content.en:
Infinite space.

Since many of the main divisions live together in the same large space-time bubble, conflicts between adjacent main divisions are inevitable.

However, the Ultimate Ancient Demon was still stable and no conflict broke out.

Moreover, many Ultimate Ancient Demons have secretly united, and even if a conflict breaks out under their command, they will endure as much as possible.

Of course, these so-called alliances are not very stable, and they are just to deal with the Dovi Demons together.

If the Dovigu Demon falls, this so-called alliance will be wiped out in an instant, and allies will become enemies.

Of course.

As long as the Dovi Demons have not fallen, they are still allies.

And more Ultimate Ancient Demons don't have the courage to deal with Dovi Ancient Demons, and their power is very low, and they act more as spectators and don't participate in it.

Time flies.

A relatively long time has passed, and there have been more and more contradictions between the major main departments, and some of them have even broken out into small wars.

For example, there were many battles between the main department of Aro and the main department of Dom.

Ye Tian was very low-key, except for occasionally plundering resources in other places, he rarely had conflicts with other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, and he was not noticed by those ultimate ancient demons.

"There seems to be something wrong with the atmosphere between the major departments!"

Ye Tian noticed this scene.

No matter how the conflict broke out between the major main divisions, those Ultimate Ancient Demons did not make a move, even if the hatred between the main department of Aro Mother and the main department of Dom was so great, the ultimate ancient demons did not end up.

And when the contradictions were about to intensify, there was a sudden ceasefire, which is really strange.

"Forget it, no matter what the situation is, I still have to improve my strength first. "

Ye Tian muttered.

So, he worked hard to improve his cultivation.

At present, the direction in which he can improve his strength is cultivation, and it is difficult to continue to improve in other aspects.

He possessed the Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane and the Extreme Life Pattern, and the Ultimate Will had also been raised to an extremely terrifying level.

Of course, he could continue to comprehend other Extreme Path Ultimate Rules, but how could it be so easy to comprehend other Extreme Path Ultimate Rules.

The ultimate rule of the Sword Extreme Dao and the ultimate rule of the Time Extreme Dao, at present, they have only comprehended these two, and they have been integrated into their own Ten Thousand Law Ultimate Rules.

If there is no special chance, it is difficult to comprehend the ultimate rules of the other extreme paths.

Therefore, Ye Tian was also trying to find a place that could assist him in comprehending the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao, but he had not found it yet.

......

Somewhere deep in the endless spaceline.

this day.

Ye Tian once again found a fragment of space-time foam, and this fragment had evolved over the infinite years, and a special power was born inside it.

"It's the power of the ultimate rules of the Space Pole Dao!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Swish!

He entered it and saw a special crack, and this crack was filled with the aura of the ultimate rule of the Spatial Extreme Dao.

So, he began to comprehend here, preparing to spend many years comprehending the ultimate rules of the Spatial Extreme Dao.

At this moment, he took out some of the ultimate ancient treasures that he had collected over the past countless years that could assist in the analysis and comprehension and improve the comprehension, and used a replica body to consume the origin to analyze the enlightenment.

As the long years passed, the replica body crumbled, but his perception of the ultimate rules of the Spatial Extreme Dao increased day by day.

It's been a long time.

this day.

Ye Tian couldn't stop laughing in the shattered fragments of space-time bubble.

"Hahahaha, I finally comprehended the ultimate rules of the Space Pole Dao!!"

Immediately.

Ye Tian tried to integrate this wisp of Spatial Extreme Dao Ultimate Rules into his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rules.

With the previous experience, Ye Tian spent a period of time successfully integrating into it.

And after integrating into the ultimate rules of the Space Extreme Dao, his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rules seem to have undergone a transformation, perhaps because of the integration of the Ultimate Rules of the Time Extreme Dao and the Ultimate Rules of the Space Extreme Dao at the same time, the fusion of time and space will have such a huge transformation.

"My strength has skyrocketed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, he felt that his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule was not too far away from transforming into a true Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule.

Once the transformation is completed, his strength will be terrifyingly improved, and even the impact on the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm in the future will become very easy, and the success rate will be extremely high.

"Continue to comprehend the other Extreme Path Ultimate Rules, if you gather enough Extreme Path Ultimate Rules, and then integrate them into my Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rules, you will definitely be able to transform and promote the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rules!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, he was now desperately looking for a place where he could comprehend the ultimate rules of the other extreme paths.

......

"The Endless Time and Space Domain is a large space-time bubble, and there must be places in it that contain the ultimate rules of other Extreme Paths, but such a place must be occupied, you have to inquire, otherwise it will be too much waste of time just to look for it from the endless space-time line, and it depends on luck. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And the information and intelligence that Luo Mother's main department knows must be above him, so he is going to consult the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse of Luo Mother's main department.

As for the ultimate ancient demon of the main department of Aro's mother, he didn't necessarily pay attention to him.

this day.

Ye Tian and the peak 810 peak ancient demon-level powerhouse of the main department of Ah Luo's mother, Ji Chi Ancient Demon, gathered together to discuss.

During this period, Ye Tian was able to reach the treasure land that contained the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao. []

Ji Chi Ancient Demon Dao: "It seems that the Heavenly Ancient Demon wants to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao, but how difficult it is to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao, even if it contains the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao, that bit of power is not enough to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao, and it is of little significance." "

"Does Ji Chi Ancient Demon know about such a place?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Of course I know, our Arrow Mother has such a treasure land. "Ji Chi Ancient Demon Dao.

"Can you let me go in and see for a while?"

Ye Tian said again.

"Do you want to go in and attain enlightenment?" Ji Chi Gu Mo didn't answer immediately, this was not something he could do.

"I'll have to ask the clan. "

Ji Chi Ancient Demon Dao.

"That's troublesome Ji Chi Gu Demon!"

Ye Tiandao.

Soon after.

Ji Chi Ancient Demon replied to Ye Tian: "Heavenly Ancient Demon, our Luo Mother Main Department can let you go to enlightenment, but we need you to fight for Luo Mother Master in the future, and you must not refuse for any reason, are you willing?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

"Then come with me!"

Ji Chi Ancient Demon took Ye Tian to that treasure land.
